CIPHER.221.cipherString: Nothing really succeeds which is not based on reality; sham, in a large sense, is never successful
CIPHER.221.question: A mysterious balloon release at the science fair carried this Aristocrat banner by Whipple. What does it say?
CIPHER.221.author: Whipple

CIPHER.218.cipherString: Nobody has ever said the negotiation would be straightforward and simple.
CIPHER.218.question: A weathered note is found inside an old science textbook. The writing appears to be a quote by Chris Grayling encoded as a Porta using a keyword of PREFIX. What does it say?
CIPHER.218.author: Chris Grayling

CIPHER.198.question: Someone taped a piece of paper with this sequence onto the back of a trophy from last year's Science Olympiad. It's a quote, written using a Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 0344 67518 95812 decode to?

CIPHER.203.cipherString: Every race and every nation should be judged by the best it has been able to produce, not by the worst.
CIPHER.203.question: The message below was intercepted from an experimental satellite transmission. It contains a quote by James Weldon Johnson, encoded as an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains the word THE twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.203.author: James Weldon Johnson

CIPHER.197.cipherString: One to another cannot be a perfect physician.
CIPHER.197.question: You find this encoded line written in invisible ink on a lab safety poster. It's a quote by George Herbert, written in a Baconian. You are told that the deciphered text starts with ONET. What does it say?
CIPHER.197.author: George Herbert

CIPHER.215.cipherString: I had a vocal coach. It's a sad thing, but I had to hire someone so that I could get my Australian accent back.
CIPHER.215.question: Scrawled in dry-erase marker on the whiteboard after hours: this Aristocrat encoded quote by Anthony LaPaglia using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains I. What does it say?
CIPHER.215.author: Anthony LaPaglia

CIPHER.216.cipherString: Birth, ancestry, and what we have ourselves not done, I would hardly call our own.
CIPHER.216.question: A strange code appears in the footer of a document you print from the lab computer. It's a quote by Ovid, encoded in a Checkerboard with a polybius key of MEASURING. What does it say?
CIPHER.216.author: Ovid

CIPHER.211.cipherString: The further you progress, the higher the ideal of perfection toward which you strive rises.
CIPHER.211.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be a quote from A Calendar of Wisdom, encoded using an Aristocrat Cipher. You are told that the cipher contains the word you twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.211.author: A Calendar of Wisdom

CIPHER.220.cipherString: I don't care anything about reasons, but I know what I like.
CIPHER.220.question: Your science fair project logs contain a mysterious string of letters. It's a quote by Henry James, encoded as a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote starts with IDONT. What does it say?
CIPHER.220.author: Henry James

CIPHER.219.cipherString: I'll never second guess the things that I have done. I've got too much left to say and too much to become.
CIPHER.219.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by Alex Gaskarth, encrypted with an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What was the K1 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.219.author: Alex Gaskarth

CIPHER.204.cipherString: No fool was ever so foolish, but some one thought him clever.
CIPHER.204.question: Your locker door has a Proverb scratched in a Complete Columnar cipher. The quote has FOOLI somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.204.author: Proverb

CIPHER.209.cipherString: It is more important to discover a new source of happiness on earth than a new planet in the sky.
CIPHER.209.question: Your drone photographed some weird markings in a parking lot. Turns out it's a quote in an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.209.author: Unknown

CIPHER.202.cipherString: In every author let us distinguish the man from his works.
CIPHER.202.question: A glitch in the school's grading portal displayed this string that you recognize as a Baconian cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.202.author: Authors

CIPHER.205.cipherString: La diferencia entre Novia y Novia es ese pequeño espacio intermedio que llamamos Friend Zone.
CIPHER.205.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote in Spanish, encrypted using a Xenocrypt using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.205.author: Unknown
CIPHER.205.translation: The difference between Girlfriend and Girl Friend is that little space in between we call the Friend Zone.

CIPHER.208.cipherString: Why is the right place always so terrifying?
CIPHER.208.question: A message flashes briefly on a malfunctioning computer screen. It turns out to be a quote by the video game Destiny written in a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.208.author: the video game Destiny

CIPHER.196.cipherString: Brass shines with constant usage, a beautiful dress needs wearing; Leave a house empty, it rots.
CIPHER.196.question: You found the following carved into the bark of a hollow log. You are told that it's a quote by Ovid encoded as an Aristocrat. You are told that the cipher ends with rots. What does it say?
CIPHER.196.author: Ovid

CIPHER.206.cipherString: Whatever word or action you send to the Universe, you'll receive it back. Choose wisely.
CIPHER.206.question: Astronomers notice this repeating sequence in deep-space data. It's actually a quote by Anoir Ou-chad, encoded with a Complete Columnar. The quote has ACTION somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.206.author: Anoir Ou-chad

CIPHER.201.cipherString: Every reform, however necessary, will by weak minds be carried to an excess, that itself will need reforming.
CIPHER.201.question: Someone left this encrypted quote scribbled on the chalkboard before class began. It's a quote by Samuel Taylor Coleridge, written as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains the word will twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.201.author: Samuel Taylor Coleridge

CIPHER.212.cipherString: The older we get, the more our eyes hold, the more expressive it gets!
CIPHER.212.question: A message in a bottle washed up in the school's decorative fountain—decode this Nihilist Substitution cipher text by RJ Yolande Mendes with a keyword of THINGS and polybius key of FATIGUED. What does it say?
CIPHER.212.author: RJ Yolande Mendes

CIPHER.213.cipherString: Wit is the sudden marriage of ideas which before their union were not perceived to have any relation.
CIPHER.213.question: Upon searching a room, the following were found on scraps of paper. You are told it's a quote by Mark Twain encoded as an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. What was the K2 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.213.author: Mark Twain

CIPHER.214.cipherString: There is only one science, physics: everything else is social work.
CIPHER.214.question: While analyzing the background noise from a physics experiment, you detect this pattern. It's a quote by James D. Watson, encoded using a Complete Columnar. The quote has SCIENCE somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.214.author: James D. Watson

CIPHER.217.cipherString: We must thank to all the failed people in the history as they showed us the true way to success!
CIPHER.217.question: You stumble across this encoded text on an old floppy disk labeled “Project Discovery.” It's a quote by Mehmet Murat ildan encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.217.author: Mehmet Murat ildan

CIPHER.207.cipherString: I have always had the same personal statement: to gain knowledge and apply it back home.
CIPHER.207.question: Someone left this coded message in the school lab. You are told it's a quote by Catherine Nakalembe encoded with a Checkerboard with a polybius key of MASTERFUL. What does it say?
CIPHER.207.author: Catherine Nakalembe

CIPHER.195.cipherString: Now that the pass has gone
CIPHER.195.question: Your robot vacuum just projected this message onto the ceiling. It's a quote by Sindiwe Magona encoded with a Hill with a keyword of PLOD. What does it say?
CIPHER.195.author: Sindiwe Magona

CIPHER.199.cipherString: A man was found guilty of overusing commas. The judge warned him to expect a really long sentence.
CIPHER.199.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote, written as an Aristocrat Cipher using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.199.author: Unknown

CIPHER.210.question: This code is found written in chalk on the sidewalk outside the science building. It's a quote, written in a Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 86792 75 40132 decode to?

CIPHER.200.cipherString: I always say centered food equals centered behavior.
CIPHER.200.question: An explorer's journal mentions a “hidden truth” encoded below. It turns out to be a quote by Marilu Henner, written in a Nihilist Substitution Cipher with a keyword of INGEST and polybius key of COUNTRYSIDE. What does it say?
CIPHER.200.author: Marilu Henner
